title: OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CONNECTED SPACE COUNSELING N AVENUE OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health therapy. 532 N Avenue Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Ages 14-80 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email (971) 404-4668 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 404-4668 Main phone Main phone (971) 404-4668 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, accepts OHP DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet MAX blue line stops .5 miles from office Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Mental Health Evaluation * Anxiety Disorders Mental Health Evaluation * Major Depression If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
